faction talk.name: Faction Talk
faction talk.description: Funny, fast and unfiltered talk with Sam Roberts' show every morning, The Bonfire with comedians Big Jay Oakerson & Robert Kelly at night and the only father daughter radio show in the world, The Bennington Show, in the middle of your day. Add Eddie Trunk daily for a celebration of all things hard rock & heavy metal, and you've got Faction Talk. (explicit)

nhl network radio.name: NHL Network Radio
nhl network radio.description: Delivering a high energy mix of information and entertainment, SiriusXM® NHL Network Radio™ is the on-ice leader with analysis, excitement, expert opinion, up to the second news and the very best in NHL® play-by-play right through the Stanley Cup® Playoffs. By hockey fans for hockey fans, it's the greatest hockey innovation since the Zamboni® machine.

siriusxm pga tour radio.name: SiriusXM PGA TOUR Radio
siriusxm pga tour radio.description: SiriusXM PGA TOUR Radio is home to the most comprehensive coverage in golf with news, tournament scores, and highlights from the PGA TOUR, Champions TOUR, Korn Ferry TOUR, & LPGA TOUR.

40s junction.name: 40s Junction
40s junction.description: This joint is jumpin'! The swing era lives on as you journey on the Savoy Express to the 40s Junction! A station humming with big bands, vocal stars, and classic melodies from the 1940s. You'll be in 'In The Mood,' to jitterbug and lindy hop! Crooners serenade and harmony groups shine in jazzy orchestras that swing and sway. So, hey hep cats! 'Let's Dance!'

90s on 9.name: 90s on 9
90s on 9.description: If it was 'all that' in the 90s, it's on 90s on 9. Get jiggy with the hottest 90s music from boy bands to pop queens, grunge rock, hip-hop and R&B with artists like Mariah Carey, Backstreet Boys, TLC, Green Day, Alanis Morissette, Boyz II Men, Aerosmith, Britney Spears and more. Hosted by legendary personalities Downtown Julie Brown & Spyder Harrison, singer/songwriter Lisa Loeb and Sugar Ray's Mark McGrath.

the loft.name: The Loft
the loft.description: Eclectic rock and rhythm from all-time legends and up-and-coming artists.

pop2k.name: Pop2K
pop2k.description: It's the hits from the 2000s that hit you right in the memories. Hear Justin Timberlake, Maroon 5, Nelly, Nickelback and all the songs you have a story about.

mad dog sports radio.name: Mad Dog Sports Radio
mad dog sports radio.description: Christopher 'Mad Dog' Russo, Adam Schein, Damon Amendolara, Mike Babchik & more talk about the world of sports.

escape.name: Escape
escape.description: Whenever you listen, you'll always hear the world's most beautiful easy listening music...great melodies that you can hum along to!

kids place.name: Kids Place
kids place.description: Hear live hosts, laugh-out-loud calls with real kids, and the best in family-friendly music and entertainment.

viva.name: Viva
viva.description: Los mejores y más conocidos artistas de hoy en Pop y Baladas. Una explosión de talento con los cantantes de Pop más pegados. ¡Vívelo! The brightest Latin stars in contemporary pop, alternative and ballads, playing Tini, Camilo, Piso 21, Karol G, Rosalia, Anitta, Sebastian Yatra, Kali Uchis and more.

the village.name: The Village
the village.description: Traditional, contemporary and indie-folk music from the past to today. Hear songs and ballads from songwriters like Bob Dylan, Ellis Paul, Joan Baez, Iron & Wine, Peter Paul & Mary, Dar Williams, Judy Collins, Carolina Chocolate Drops, Pete Seeger, Jesse Welles and more.

the groove.name: The Groove
the groove.description: Get your groove on with Old School R&B. Hear the important artists from the '70s and '80s including Michael Jackson, Luther Vandross, Janet Jackson, EW&F, Isley Brothers, the Gap Band and more.

bill gaither's enlighten.name: Bill Gaither's enLighten
bill gaither's enlighten.description: Uplifting, harmony-driven Gospel music with stories, inspiration and hope from iconic singer/songwriter Bill Gaither. Plus music from The GVB, Booth Brothers, Jeff & Sheri Easter, Karen Peck & New River, Greater Vision & more.

pro wrestling nation24/7.name: Pro Wrestling Nation24/7
pro wrestling nation24/7.description: The only channel dedicated to the world of pro wrestling! Live daily shows covering everything that's going on in WWE, TNA, AEW, the 'Indies' & more. Hear from all the top superstars like Cody Rhodes, CM Punk, 'MJF', on a daily basis. Plus, daily recaps on the nightly action from everything wrestling company around the world. It's your one stop shop for all things pro wrestling.

c-span radio.name: C-SPAN Radio
c-span radio.description: From the halls of Congress, U.S. agency hearings, committee meetings, and policy-shaping events.

siriusxm urban view.name: SiriusXM Urban View
siriusxm urban view.description: Urban View features dynamic discourse from prominent Black voices on topics ranging from civil rights, politics, pop culture, faith, tech, financial wellness, and more. Join Karen Hunter, Clay Cane, Lurie Daniel Favors, Rev. Al Sharpton, Lou Hutt, Wilmer Leon, Reecie Colbert, Shermichael Singleton and many more voices as they bring you powerful and engaging conversation.

prx remix.name: PRX Remix
prx remix.description: Creative showcase for the best documentaries, stories, and audio pieces from indie producers and new voices within and beyond public radio.

the verge.name: The Verge
the verge.description: Discover new and emerging Canadian indie & alternative artists. Learn more about new artists through live in-studio performances, exclusive concerts broadcast live to air & more.

influence franco.name: Influence Franco
influence franco.description: Whether they're written for the street of for the clubs, urban music has seen its audience grow in the past decades. Since L'école du micro d'argent by IAM, French artists have been at it, creating original, unique and upbeat songs. Hear the best new releases from the likes of Loud, Stromae and Sarahmée to classics from Muzion and Dubmatique without missing a beat from the hottest club hits, Influence Franco is your one stop for everything rap and danse in French.

siriusxm scoreboard.name: SiriusXM Scoreboard
siriusxm scoreboard.description: Final sports scores every 10 minutes, along with news, notes, and information from all your favorite sporting events, including NFL, NHL, NBA, and MLB. Get caught up on all the scores and action from all around the world, 24/7, including up-to-date information and interviews from all SiriusXM sports channels, all in a tight 10 minute wheel.

espn xtra.name: ESPN Xtra
espn xtra.description: ESPN Xtra features simulcasts of ESPN's biggest shows including their flagship program, SportsCenter, and simulcasts of First Take, Get Up!, College Gameday and The Paul Finebaum Show.

siriusxm indycar nation.name: SiriusXM INDYCAR Nation
siriusxm indycar nation.description: SiriusXM's home for all things NTT INDYCAR Series. From heart-pounding play-by-play of every race to weekly talk shows and specials with the legends of the sport, SiriusXM INDYCAR Nation has you covered from the green flag to the checkered flag.

siriusxm comedy club.name: SiriusXM Comedy Club
siriusxm comedy club.description: The SiriusXM Comedy Club is the ultimate comedy listening experience. From emerging talent to big names, it's non-stop uncensored laughs from Canada's best like Steph Tolev, Russell Peters, K Trevor Wilson and more. (explicit)

family talk.name: Family Talk
family talk.description: Featuring the best in Christian teaching ministries, powerful talk radio, and entertainment.

mlb network radio.name: MLB Network Radio
mlb network radio.description: Expert hosts and knowledgeable insiders cover the bases with trade rumors, breaking news, injury reports and scores from the day pitchers & catchers report, through the World Series and right on into the offseason. MLB Network Radio™ is talking baseball 24/7/365. Call 866-MLB-ONXM and take your cuts!

ms now.name: MS NOW
ms now.description: MS NOW is a premier destination for breaking news and best-in-class opinion journalism, reaching diverse audiences across cable, online, social, and audio. MS NOW is an essential part of millions of Americans' daily lives, commanding one of the most engaged audiences across all of television with the average viewer watching for more than eight hours each week.

fantasy sports radio.name: Fantasy Sports Radio
fantasy sports radio.description: SiriusXM Fantasy Sports Radio is the only 24/7 radio channel exclusively dedicated to fantasy sports. Get expert advice, strategy and information plus hear interviews with athletes, coaches and insiders to help you dominate your league.

pearl jam radio.name: Pearl Jam Radio
pearl jam radio.description: Listen to music spanning Pearl Jam's career on their own SiriusXM channel. On Pearl Jam Radio, you'll hear studio tracks, b-sides, and concert recordings from the Pearl Jam vault.

hur voices.name: HUR Voices
hur voices.description: HUR Voices is real talk with real music for and from the people. HUR Voices is talk with a purpose that examines and explores issues that affect people of color, and music that combines new and classic soul with R&B for listener enjoyment. HUR Voices programming embodies the mission of Howard University which is to provide 'America and the Global Community' with excellence, leadership, truth and service. Managed by WHUR 96.3 FM, Howard University.

hbcu.name: HBCU
hbcu.description: HBCU is a collective blend of programming from Historically Black Colleges and Universities and offers a unique look into the black college experience. It bridges the gap between alumni, current and prospective students through information and entertainment. HBCU is a resource for students and faculty of each institution to work together to educate and empower. The management and delivery of programming is provided by Howard University's Radio Network, located on the university campus.

byuradio.name: BYUradio
byuradio.description: BYUradio provides fresh, fun and informative radio programming for audiences of all ages. Whether you're looking for engaging conversations (The Lisa Show), deep dives on current events (Top of Mind with Julie Rose), explorations on the world around you (Constant Wonder), or the best in storytelling (The Apple Seed), BYUradio has something for every member of the family.

korea today.name: Korea Today
korea today.description: Get access to the best Korean content 24-hours-per-day on Korea Today Satellite Radio. Enjoy a variety of music (pop, classical, folk), global, local and entertainment news, talk shows, sports radio, and cultural programs. Korea Today's content is fresh and comes directly from Korea. Korea Today features the best of Korean radio from multiple sources to provide the most interesting and entertaining programs for our audience.

holy culture radio.name: Holy Culture Radio
holy culture radio.description: Holy Culture Radio is your home for everything Christian Hip-Hop and R&P. From introducing upcoming artists to discussions about faith, arts, vocation, and education with legends in the industry and more, Holy Culture is tapping into CHH like nobody else! Plus, Holy Culture has got some of the best DJs and hosts playing music from back in the day all the way to the newest tracks dropping today.

latin vault.name: Latin Vault
latin vault.description: Revisit the sounds and rich history of music pioneers from the 50's, 60's, 70's, and early 80's the decades that shaped the Latin music landscape as it is today.

en vivo.name: En Vivo
en vivo.description: Where music is born! En Vivo is the official satellite radio channel of the Latin Grammys, bringing the best in live entertainment and new music.

phish radio.name: Phish Radio
phish radio.description: SiriusXM takes you all the way inside the Phish universe, pairing their massive live archive, studio tracks, and the band's musical influences with exclusive band member commentary. You'll also hear specialty shows hosted by the band, complete concert broadcasts from the band's tour stops, and plenty of surprises taboot.

studio 54 radio.description: Disco, Classic, and Euro Dance music 24/7, plus legendary DJs like Jellybean Benitez, Robbie Leslie, Tony Smith, and The Marc & Myra Show hosted by original Studio 54 employees Marc Benecke and Myra Scheer.

chucho's cuba & beyond.name: Chucho's Cuba & Beyond
chucho's cuba & beyond.description: Legendary Cuban pianist, bandleader and composer, Chucho Valdés invites you on a timeless musical journey to explore the cultural richness of Cuban music, past and present. freakonomics radio.description: Explore the hidden side of everything with storytelling both rigorous and entertaining. law&crime.name: Law&Crime
law&crime.description: Law&Crime is the leading destination for true crime and law enforcement programming. Founded by acclaimed legal analyst and attorney Dan Abrams, Law&Crime offers an inside look at the compelling world of law enforcement, featuring in-depth bodycam footage and more. Our daily lineup includes binge-worthy law enforcement series plus original primetime programming.

attitude franco.name: Attitude Franco
attitude franco.description: All the rock attitude, whether commercial or alternative. From sacred icons like Offenbach and Corbeau to newcomers Corridor and Gazoline, if it's French rock, you'll hear it here!

mixtape: north.name: Mixtape: North
mixtape: north.description: Playing the newest hits from Drake and Jesse Reyez to classic throwbacks from Kardinal Offishall and K-OS to the hottest emerging voices from the Canadian underground. Mixtape: North is the dopest mix of hip-hop and R&B. (explicit)

racines musicales.name: Racines Musicales
racines musicales.description: Be it Marcel Martel or Marie King, Lisa Leblanc or Elisapie, Les Soeurs Boulay or Kain, French Canada's rich history of homegrown music is to be found on Racines Musicales. Songs that come from the heart, by French and Indigenous artists. If it's Country, Folk, Cajun or Traditional music, you'll hear it here!

top of the country radio.name: Top of the Country Radio
top of the country radio.description: The rich history of Canadian Country music finally has a home on Top of The Country Radio. A perfect blend of the songs you know and love from the '90s and 2000s all the way to emerging country superstars you're about to fall for. You'll hear Dallas Smith, Megan Patrick, Tenille Townes, Tim Hicks, Shania Twain and many more!

outsiders radio.name: Outsiders Radio
outsiders radio.description: Eric Church brings you Outsiders Radio, a journey through his musical experiences featuring collaborations and recordings with friends, along with behind the scenes stories from his nearly two-plus-decade career. Handpicked by The Chief himself, stop in and explore live performances plus the music he loves, from rock to country & beyond.

hits uno.name: Hits Uno
hits uno.description: From the SiriusXM studios in Miami, your new home for today's biggest Latin pop hits from around the globe! From pop to reggaeton, dance to viral LatinX hits, somos los exitos! (explicit)

nfl en español 832.name: NFL en Español 832
nfl en español 832.description: SiriusXM offers live Spanish language broadcasts of select NFL games.

mlb en español 870.name: MLB en Español 870
mlb en español 870.description: SiriusXM offers live Spanish language broadcasts of select MLB games.

mlb en español 871.name: MLB en Español 871
mlb en español 871.description: SiriusXM offers live Spanish language broadcasts of select MLB games.

siriusxm app originals.name: SiriusXM App Originals
siriusxm app originals.description: SiriusXM App Originals is the home of on-demand music and pop-culture content created exclusively for the SiriusXM App. From eclectic weekly countdown show 'The List' to the perfect soundtrack tailored to a season or occasion in the Ultimate Music Mixes, SiriusXM App Originals is here for every moment. You're likely to get hooked - and you might even learn something new.

carrie's country.name: Carrie's Country
carrie's country.description: You've entered Carrie's Country: a musical journey created by country's iconic rhinestoned superstar. Carrie shares the stories behind her record-breaking career and catalog - and highlights her friends, favorites, and influences. Hear new and classic country, workout hits, gospel and beyond. Plus, high-octane favorites from classic to hard rock for your morning exercise or your late-night jam sessions. Featuring drop-ins from Carrie's crew, friends, and fans - and of course, Carrie herself!

cocomelon & friends.name: CoComelon & Friends
cocomelon & friends.description: Sing nursery rhymes with CoComelon, go 'vroom, vroom,' to vehicle songs with Blippi and express yourself with Little Angel. With a song for every moment in a toddler's day, CoComelon and Friends brings hours of fun for the whole family, plus soothing lullabies to end the night.

the jeff lewis channel.name: The Jeff Lewis Channel
the jeff lewis channel.description: Hear the archives, plus exclusive content from your favorite guests and Chumps. It's great news for you, but a nightmare for our lawyers. (explicit)

sports 998.name: Sports 998
sports 998.description: Home of the The Jim Rome Show, plus live sports play-by-play.

chris stapleton radio.name: Chris Stapleton Radio
chris stapleton radio.description: Get closer to one of the most original and authentic artists today - singer, songwriter, and musician, Chris Stapleton. Listen as he shares music spanning his entire career, and the stories behind those songs. Chris Stapleton Radio is the home to the kings and queens of country, rock, soul, and more - handpicked by Chris and his band, The Honchos.

the kelly clarkson connection.name: The Kelly Clarkson Connection
the kelly clarkson connection.description: The Kelly Clarkson universe hits the airwaves with The Kelly Clarkson Connection! Make yourself comfortable in Kelly's world - you'll be surrounded by the music she loves, music she's inspired by and the stories behind the songs in Kelly's two-decade long catalog of award-winning hits. Experience the chemistry of The Kelly Clarkson Connection!

the flow.name: The Flow
the flow.description: Remember how you felt the first time you heard Beyonce's first solo album? How about the chills that ran down your spine when you heard that CTRL album from SZA? If you do, then you'll be all about THE FLOW! It's all about those good R&B vibes from the 2000s and 2010s. The biggest hits in R&B since the turn of the millennium!

flex2k.name: Flex2K
flex2k.description: The 2000s marked a special time in hip-hop with classic albums such as 'Get Rich or Die Trying,' the strong emergence of southern rap, and rise of superstars like Drake, Nicki Minaj, Kendrick Lamar, J. Cole and others. Hear it all on one dedicated channel, Flex2k. (explicit)

alt2k.name: Alt2K
alt2k.description: Relive the emotion, energy, and exploration of 2000s and 2010s alternative. Hear the pop-punk, rock, indie, and emo that rewrote the rules and defined a generation from artists like Blink-182, The Killers, Paramore, The Strokes, Linkin Park, and more.

life with john mayer.name: Life with John Mayer
life with john mayer.description: A music experience hand-selected by John Mayer. The guitarist and songwriter finally realizes his dream of a radio station defined not by genre, but by the time of day, as well as the day of the week. Enter an ever-evolving world of music built from his classics, collaborations and never-before-heard material blended with the songs he loves. Don't just tune into SiriusXM. Tune into life... with John Mayer.

radio monaco.name: Radio Monaco
radio monaco.description: Take a dance journey to Monte Carlo and hear music, celebrity news and hosts where the European party never ends. From F1 all-nighters to late night house music vibes, join the 24/7 party on the SiriusXM app and on the satellite.

savior sunday daily.name: Savior Sunday Daily
savior sunday daily.description: A fan-favorite feature on Carrie's Country is a full-time channel in the SiriusXM app. Savior Sunday Daily by Carrie's Country brings you a daily blend of uplifting faith-based country and gospel music handpicked by Carrie. Hear Carrie's versions of gospel standards from the Grammy-award winning album 'My Savior,' timeless spiritual country and new classics from Dolly Parton, Alan Jackson, and Nashville's rising stars.

disney jr. radio.name: Disney Jr. Radio
disney jr. radio.description: Disney Jr. Radio is the ultimate music destination for families on SiriusXM! Listen to hit songs from your favorite shows like Mickey Mouse Clubhouse, Spidey and His Amazing Friends, SuperKitties and many more! Disney Jr. Radio brings together the greatest characters, stories, and music for families with preschoolers everywhere!

utah mammoth.name: Utah Mammoth
utah mammoth.description: Live hometown play-by-play coverage of the Utah Mammoth

smartless radio.name: SmartLess Radio
smartless radio.description: SmartLess Radio is the destination for 24/7 SmartLess! 'SmartLess' with Jason Bateman, Sean Hayes & Will Arnett is a podcast that connects and unites people from all walks of life to learn about shared experiences through thoughtful dialogue and organic hilarity. In each episode of SmartLess, one of the hosts reveals his mystery guest to the other two. What ensues is a genuinely improvised and authentic conversation filled with laughter and newfound knowledge to feed the SmartLess mind. (explicit)

fox weather.name: FOX Weather
fox weather.description: FOX Weather is your home for 24/7 weather news. With the latest forecasts and continuous weather coverage when it matters most. From breaking weather stories, to live reports from the field, America's weather team delivers expert analysis in real-time to help you through the storm.

dateline 24/7.name: Dateline 24/7
dateline 24/7.description: Listen to Dateline 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Discover top true crime mysteries on the Dateline 24/7 channel.

nbc news now.name: NBC News NOW
nbc news now.description: NBC News NOW is the online streaming network from NBC News, providing live breaking news, in-depth reporting, and news headlines when you want them. It features the best-in-class journalism from NBC News, with unparalleled access to journalists and reporters on the ground, wherever news is happening, all over the world.

siriusxo.name: SiriusXO
siriusxo.description: Love songs 90s - now. The soundtrack to your modern love story. Find your feels with beats straight from the hearts of artists like Bruno Mars, Taylor Swift, John Mayer, Mariah Carey, Michael Bublé and more!

unwell on air.name: Unwell On Air
unwell on air.description: Welcome to Unwell On Air, the official home for all things trending, curated by Alex Cooper. Catch the best moments from each Unwell Network podcast, alongside exclusive daily radio shows that keep you in the know. We're breaking down the latest in pop culture on The Daily Dirty, and opening up the phone lines on Dialed In, because we want you to join the conversation. Unwell On Air is your one-stop destination for premium, unfiltered content. (explicit)

unwell music.name: Unwell Music
unwell music.description: A music experience from Call Her Daddy host and Unwell founder Alex Cooper, featuring nostalgic throwbacks and trending hits along with stories from Alex and other Unwell hosts - a soundtrack that delivers the main character energy you deserve! (explicit)

soccer en español.name: Soccer en Español
soccer en español.description: SiriusXM offers live Spanish language broadcasts of select soccer games.

one world radio.name: One World Radio
one world radio.description: One World Radio is recognized as a global dance brand that features, international DJs, music and some of the most popular festivals in the world, the multi-weekend Tomorrowland in Boom, Belgium. (explicit)

siriusxm dhamaka.name: SiriusXM Dhamaka
siriusxm dhamaka.description: From Bollywood to bhangra to hip-hop and more, South Asian music breaks boundaries and spans generations. SiriusXM Dhamaka is the home for all of your favorite South Asian artists from across the globe. You'll hear Diljit Dosanjh, Karan Aujla, Jonita Gandhi, Divine, AP Dhillon, Ikky Singh, Sidhu Moosewala and many more.

maximum metallica.name: Maximum Metallica
maximum metallica.description: Ride the lightning 24/7 through Metallica's heaviest hits, rare tracks, epic live concerts, unfiltered stories, and fan-fueled fire! The Metallica family unites here, louder, faster, and heavier than ever. The most Metallica anywhere! (explicit)

experts only radio.name: Experts Only Radio
experts only radio.description: John Summit takes you on a musical journey without limits! Hear his bi-weekly show and discover a variety of sounds and styles as well as DJ sets from around the world. (explicit)

celia cruz azúcar!.name: Celia Cruz AZÚCAR!
celia cruz azúcar!.description: Saluting the most influential Afro-Latina woman in music history, this is Celia Cruz AZUCAR! A centennial celebration of her vibrant legacy, timeless music & unmistakable spark that continues to inspire generations worldwide. From her trailblazing hits with the iconic Fania Records to her early 2000s global anthems, experience the full spectrum of sound from the undisputed Queen of Salsa. Pay tribute to Celia's extraordinary life and enduring influence! Azúcar!

the megyn kelly channel.name: The Megyn Kelly Channel
the megyn kelly channel.description: The Megyn Kelly Channel is your home for bold, no B.S. news. We don't suffer fools, but we love mocking them! All facts, no apologies. Hear open, honest, and provocative conversations with Megyn, plus other contributors.

the message.name: The Message
the message.description: Uplifting worship music that sings to God. It's the music you hear and sing in your Sunday service.

comedy in full.name: Comedy in Full
comedy in full.description: Comedy in Full delivers a seamless, full-album comedy experience, thoughtfully curated for nonstop laughs and effortless listening. It's the go-to destination for uninterrupted comedy with a refined touch, bringing you complete comedy albums, played as intended, all the time. (explicit)

f1 on siriusxm.name: F1 on SiriusXM
f1 on siriusxm.description: SiriusXM's home for Formula 1 racing! Hear every thrilling lap in F1's worldwide championship chase, plus pre- and post-race coverage and weekly shows featuring F1 experts who bring you inside the world of F1 with interviews with the biggest names in racing. SiriusXM F1 Radio takes you into the paddock, onto the grid, and onto the podium around the world of F1 racing.

morgan wallen radio.name: Morgan Wallen Radio
morgan wallen radio.description: Setting the pace in, and beyond, country music, Morgan Wallen takes you inside his world. Hear personal stories from inside the studio, on the road and more. Music from his friends, collaborators, and influences live alongside Morgan's chart-toppers - all handpicked by Morgan Wallen. Plus, drop-ins from the people that make up his life on and off the stadium stage.

20/20 true crime.name: 20/20 True Crime
20/20 true crime.description: A nonstop destination for gripping true crime storytelling from ABC News and 20/20. Hear award-winning podcasts, full episodes of 20/20, installments of 20/20: The After Show, and cases from the 20/20 True Crime Vault. From headline-making investigations to unforgettable mysteries, dive into the stories, twists, and reporting that brings the truth to light. True Crime, all the time.

abc news live.name: ABC News Live
abc news live.description: ABC News Live is your daily source for breaking news across the U.S. and around the globe. Stay up to date on the latest headlines in politics, weather, health, business and more with our 24/7 live streaming coverage.

cnbc.name: CNBC
cnbc.description: Get real-time financial market coverage and business information.

the highway.name: The Highway
the highway.description: Discover the next generation of country superstars on The Highway - where breakthrough Highway Finds meet brand new music from country's biggest hitmakers. Hosted weekdays by Cody Alan, Macie Banks, Buzz Brainard and Ania Hammar from the heart of Broadway in downtown Nashville, Tennessee.

siriusxm progress.name: SiriusXM Progress
siriusxm progress.description: SiriusXM Progress amplifies voices demanding justice, equality, and liberty for all. Hear progressive viewpoints from a wide range of voices including Zerlina Maxwell, Stephanie Miller, Thom Hartmann, Michelangelo Signorile, Dean Obeidallah, John Fugelsang, and more.

siriusxm hits 1.name: SiriusXM Hits 1
siriusxm hits 1.description: Today's hits from pop, hip-hop, rock, rhythm, country and R&B. Featuring The Morning Mash Up with Ryan & Nicole, Mack & Jen middays, Gaby Symon afternoons, Mikey Piff evenings, plus Spyder Harrison and the HITS 1 Weekend Countdown.

outlaw country.name: Outlaw Country
outlaw country.description: No borders, no B.S. -- from country's roots to today's outsiders that just won't be fenced in. Hear Americana, alt-country, country classics, country rock, honky tonk, roots rock & more!

college sports radio.name: College Sports Radio
college sports radio.description: SiriusXM College Sports Radio features the most comprehensive, 24/7 college sports talk and play-by-play. Hear the top experts in college sports including Danny Kanell, Dusty Dvoracek, Rick Neuheisel and EJ Manuel. Hear the best live play-by-play, including college football bowl games and Playoffs, NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament plus coverage of college baseball, softball, women's basketball, hockey and more.

siriusly sinatra.name: Siriusly Sinatra
siriusly sinatra.description: The Chairman of the Board is at home everyday on Siriusly Sinatra, along with Dean Martin, Tony Bennett and more of the great singers interpreting the Great American Songbook. Siriusly Sinatra is the 24-hour home for all things Frank and the standards he made famous!

jam on 309.name: Jam On 309
jam on 309.description: It's a non-stop music festival with live, improvisational, and adventurous rock from artists who thrive in a live concert setting. You'll hear Phish, Dave Matthews Band, My Morning Jacket, moe., Umphrey's McGee, String Cheese Incident, Gov't Mule, and more.

1st wave.name: 1st Wave
1st wave.description: The First Wave of alternative music, centered in the 1980s but including legendary artists and cult classics from the '70s through the early '90s.

the pulse.name: The Pulse
the pulse.description: Today's pop music keeping you company through your day. Hear the hits, throwbacks and fresh sounds Taylor Swift, Ed Sheeran, OneRepublic, Ariana Grande and more.

50s gold.name: 50s Gold
50s gold.description: Take a trip to the era of the new teenage craze of rock 'n' roll and the pre-rock songs Mom & Dad preferred. The sound of happy days and drive-in nights with pop radio the way it used to be - from crooners to street corner harmony.

espn radio.name: ESPN Radio
espn radio.description: 24/7 Sports Talk from the worldwide leader in sports, plus some of the biggest games from the NBA, MLB, and College Sports.

shade 45.name: Shade 45
shade 45.description: The uncensored commercial free hip-hop channel created by Eminem and SiriusXM. (explicit)

grateful dead.name: Grateful Dead
grateful dead.description: On the Grateful Dead Channel, exclusively on SiriusXM, you'll hear music spanning the band's career with unreleased concert recordings, original shows hosted by band members, and even rare archival interviews with Jerry Garcia. The channel also features contributions from Grateful Dead experts David Gans and Gary Lambert as well as Dead archivist David Lemieux.

pure comedy.name: Pure Comedy
pure comedy.description: It's comedy for everybody on Pure Comedy! Check out profanity-free material from today's top comics like Jim Gaffigan and Nate Bargatze, as well as hilarious material from emerging and legendary comedians.

howard 100.name: Howard 100
howard 100.description: The exclusive home of The Howard Stern Show. Hear Howard's in-depth interviews with the biggest celebrities, his unique takes on current events, behind-the-scenes antics with the staff, phony phone calls, and much more. (explicit)

siriusxm love.name: SiriusXM Love
siriusxm love.description: Celebrate the joy of being in love, as a generation of superstars help set the mood for romance with love songs from the 60s, 70s and 80s. Hear Barry Manilow, Whitney Houston, the Bee Gees, Lionel Richie, Celine Dion, Barbra Streisand and more.

siriusxm nascar radio.name: SiriusXM NASCAR Radio
siriusxm nascar radio.description: Every race and everything in between: Taking you inside the sport with unparalleled access to the drivers, crew chiefs, team owners and other racing insiders as they talk candidly with SiriusXM NASCAR Radio. From post-race interviews in victory lane and in the garage, you'll get the latest news and information from your trusted source for all things NASCAR.

willie's roadhouse.name: Willie's Roadhouse
willie's roadhouse.description: Willie Nelson's Classic Country channel featuring songs from the '60s, '70s and '80s by artists such as Willie Nelson, Merle Haggard, Dolly Parton, George Jones, Johnny Cash, Loretta Lynn, Patsy Cline, Conway Twitty and more.

classic vinyl.name: Classic Vinyl
classic vinyl.description: Drop the needle on all the great classic rock of the 60s and 70s, when music came on vinyl. Led Zeppelin, the Beatles, the Rolling Stones, the Who, the Doors and more. All the big songs and some cool album cuts, too, played by renowned hosts like Meg Griffin, Rachel Steele, Earle Bailey and Dennis Elsas.

the blend.name: The Blend
the blend.description: Blending nice & easy pop where you can sing along with Rod Stewart, Celine Dion, Lionel Richie, Neil Diamond, Whitney Houston and more! Feeling good has never been easier!

octane.name: Octane
octane.description: Experience the loud and uncensored community of new hard rock, featuring the next generation of headbangers destined to be headliners! (explicit)

sebastianmaniscalco cmdy.name: SebastianManiscalco Cmdy
sebastianmaniscalco cmdy.description: SiriusXM's exclusive stand-up channel curated by Sebastian Maniscalco features performances by his favorite comedians. From legends of the craft to today's rising voices, the channel delivers a mix of entertaining comedy. At the center of the channel is The Sebastian Maniscalco Show, an original radio series where Sebastian brings his unmistakable perspective, stories & comedic takes to the mic. Together, they create a destination for fans who love bold stand-up & Sebastian's signature style. (explicit)

smokey's soul town.name: Smokey's Soul Town
smokey's soul town.description: Classic Soul, R&B & Motown from the '60s and '70s live in Smokey's Soul Town! Throughout the day, Smokey shares stories from his career and picks some of his favorites from Hitsville and beyond. Plus hosted DJ shows from The Motown Museum in Detroit. Stevie, Aretha, Otis, Marvin, Jackie, Chaka, The Temptations, The Miracles, The Supremes, The Four Tops and all the Soul you can handle... 24/7 on Smokey's Soul Town!!

bbc world service.name: BBC World Service
bbc world service.description: News as it breaks from around the world.

bb king's bluesville.name: BB King's Bluesville
bb king's bluesville.description: B.B. King's channel for blues music from the past to the present: B.B. King, Stevie Ray Vaughan, Muddy Waters, Buddy Guy, Eric Clapton, Etta James, Robert Cray, Keb' Mo', Taj Mahal, John Lee Hooker and others.

the heat.name: The Heat
the heat.description: The Heat stays lit with the hottest R&B and hip-hop, with artists like Chris Brown, Cardi B., SZA, Drake, Doja Cat, Lil' Baby and more!

cnn.name: CNN
cnn.description: The latest, breaking news with on-the-spot coverage and up-to-the-minute updates.

classic rewind.name: Classic Rewind
classic rewind.description: Hit the rewind button for classic rock from the cassette era: Boston, Van Halen, the Cars, Journey, Fleetwood Mac, Foreigner and more, all from the late 70s and 80s. Adding context to the tunes are marquee hosts Kristine Stone, Rachel Steele and MTV legends Alan Hunter and Mark Goodman.

siriusxm nfl radio.name: SiriusXM NFL Radio
siriusxm nfl radio.description: SiriusXM NFL Radio delivers hard-hitting analysis and up-to-the minute NFL news that true football fanatics need - 24/7/365. From the annual Training Camp Tour from all 32 teams, to Super Bowl Week broadcasts, to the Scouting Combine remotes, to live coverage of every pick of the NFL Draft, an all-pro lineup of hosts and special guests from around the league keep you in the know. Think you got game? Call us at 877-NFL-KICK.

spa.name: Spa
spa.description: Spa is an ethereal audio experience. It's new age with a twist of ambient and light world music. A perfect spa experience.

bluegrass junction.name: Bluegrass Junction
bluegrass junction.description: Experience the cutting-edge sounds of bluegrass music while never straying too far from its roots and traditions... including weekly shows from Chris Jones, Ned Luberecki, Joey Black and the legendary Del McCoury!

cbc radio one.name: CBC Radio One
cbc radio one.description: Canada's top-rated radio news and information source with some of the country's most popular shows and personalities, distributing National news and content to Canadians coast to coast. As Canada's national public broadcaster, CBC Radio aims to provide a wide range of programming that informs, enlightens and entertains with programming predominantly and distinctively Canadian, reflecting all regions of the country and actively contributing to the exchange of cultural expression.

the coffee house.name: The Coffee House
the coffee house.description: A laid-back mix of acoustic and stripped down songs that invite you to settle in and unplug from the world outside. Relax to a diverse selection of hits, new discoveries and acoustic classics.

heart & soul.name: Heart & Soul
heart & soul.description: Adult R&B from yesterday and today from artists including Charlie Wilson, Mary J. Blige, Kem, Jill Scott, Toni Braxton and more.

bloomberg radio.name: Bloomberg Radio
bloomberg radio.description: Bloomberg Radio is the world's only global 24-hour business radio station. Powered by more than 2700 journalists and analysts in more than 120 countries, Bloomberg Radio's resources are unparalleled. Because the financial markets never sleep, Bloomberg follows them around the globe.

radio classics.name: Radio Classics
radio classics.description: Radio Classics is the home for the quality programs from The Golden Age Of Radio. Before television, before audio books, before podcasts, great storytelling dominated the realm of radio. It's where imagination ruled. Superman, Dragnet, Gunsmoke, plus comedies from Jack Benny, Bob Hope, Lucille Ball, George Burns & Gracie Allen all originated on radio. Those ageless shows (and so much more) can be found on Radio Classics. Timeless stories and laughs from the past for today's SiriusXM listeners.

fox news channel.name: FOX News Channel
fox news channel.description: Become a part of America's news phenomenon with FOX News, which puts national and international news right at your fingertips. It's all here, only on the FOX News Channel.

Featuring rarities from Bob Dylan, The Rolling Stones, Led Zeppelin, David Bowie, The Beatles, The Eagles, Jethro Tull, and more.

caliente.name: Caliente
caliente.description: Salsa, bachata, reggaeton and more! A red-hot Latin mix where the sounds of the Caribbean and the Americas collide. Where Latin music & culture meet!

ewtn radio.name: EWTN Radio
ewtn radio.description: EWTN Radio listeners will find content filled with Catholic hope and inspiration. EWTN Radio offers listeners live call-in talk shows, informative teaching series, daily devotions, inspiring prayers and Church events.

real jazz.name: Real Jazz
real jazz.description: Classic jazz, the original American art form. Hear the masters who pioneered the music and the new artists who continue the tradition into the 21st century.

hair nation.name: Hair Nation
hair nation.description: A nostalgic trip to the 80's Sunset Strip and beyond! Hair Metal, Glam, 80's Hard Rock & Hair Bands. It REALLY has NOTHING to do with 'hair'.

siriusxm chill.name: SiriusXM Chill
siriusxm chill.description: Downtempo electronic and deep house music. Relax to melodic sounds that make you feel poolside no matter where you are.

the bridge.name: The Bridge
the bridge.description: Cross the bridge to the mellow side of classic rock and 70s folk rock. The Eagles, James Taylor, Fleetwood Mac, Simon & Garfunkel and more.

the spectrum.name: The Spectrum
the spectrum.description: The Spectrum of Rock, spanning more than six decades - from the legends of the 1960s and '70s to the artists breaking through now.

faction punk.name: FACTION PUNK
faction punk.description: Punk rock from a Green Day POV. Billie, Mike, and Tre deliver punk pioneers and new noise alongside their own music and stories - from early demos, to live tracks, stadium-shaking anthems, and whatever comes next. (explicit)

siriusxm patriot.name: SiriusXM Patriot
siriusxm patriot.description: SiriusXM Patriot is your home for comprehensive conservative viewpoints, hard-hitting interviews, and thought-provoking commentary. Join the conversation with Breitbart News, David Webb, Andrew Wilkow, Sean Hannity, Mark Levin, Stacy Washington, and more.

potus politics.name: POTUS Politics
potus politics.description: POTUS is Politics of the United States. Politics from all points of view with Michael Smerconish, Dan Abrams, Julie Mason, Steve Scully, Stephen A. Smith and more. Spirited interviews with representatives from both sides of the aisle. Legal analysis of breaking stories, panel discussions, and daily recaps of everything happening in Washington, D.C.

elvis radio.name: Elvis Radio
elvis radio.description: The only all Elvis all-the-time radio station, broadcasting live from Graceland. The early years, the classics, the comebacks, rarities, live tracks and basically everything Elvis ever recorded.

ici première.name: ICI Première
ici première.description: Radio-Canada news and information distributing national news, information and programming to all regions of the country. As Canada's national public broadcaster, CBC Radio-Canada provides a wide range of topics and programs to entertain and enlighten and celebrate the exchange of cultural expression in a full simulcast of Radio-Canada Première.

stars.description: Hear SiriusXM's biggest stars in intimate and revealing conversations about life and culture, share lifechanging advice, and real talk with friends. Culture and celebrity collide to bring you inside the life and style of Hollywood. (explicit)

kirk franklin's praise.name: Kirk Franklin's Praise
kirk franklin's praise.description: Grammy winning icon Kirk Franklin empowers you through your day with today's divinely inspired gospel music. Hear inspirational music from artists including Tamela Mann, Donnie McClurkin, Tye Tribett, Le'Andria Johnson and more. Kirk's got the music and the message to make ya sing, clap and shout!

on broadway.name: On Broadway
on broadway.description: You're front row center for the greatest hits of Broadway! All your favorite show tunes sung by the stars of the musical stage, bringing Broadway to every street in North America.

hip-hop nation.name: Hip-Hop Nation
hip-hop nation.description: Hip-Hop Nation is the sound of the culture where you'll hear artists like Kendrick Lamar, J. Cole, 21 Savage, Cardi B., GloRilla and more. (explicit)

the message_65.name: The Message
the message_65.description: Pop and rock with a higher purpose. Contemporary Christian music delivered by compassionate hosts to encourage you and your family on your faith journey.

comedy roundup.name: Comedy Roundup
comedy roundup.description: Jeff Foxworthy and Larry the Cable Guy bring you the best in great American comedy. You'll hear hilarious material from this dynamic duo as well as comedy from some of their personal favorite comedians. (explicit)

e street radio.name: E Street Radio
e street radio.description: E Street Radio brings you the music of Bruce Springsteen including studio outtakes, concert recordings, rarities, and more! Plus hear Bruce host his critically-acclaimed show, 'From My Home To Yours,' sharing personal stories and hand-selecting songs for you. Fans can 'Be The Boss,' hear insights from E Street Band members, and enjoy special Guest DJ sessions. It's the home of all things Bruce!

watercolors.name: Watercolors
watercolors.description: A sonic landscape of silky, smooth jazz melodies and alluring contemporary jazz rhythms. Indulge the senses with soulful saxophone, mesmerizing piano, breezy guitar and groovy bass lines. Lively art for your ears.

siriusxm pops.name: SiriusXM Pops
siriusxm pops.description: Classical Music's greatest hits performed by the world's most renowned orchestras and soloists. Including Yo-Yo Ma, 2Cellos and The Boston Pops Orchestra. Featuring works by Beethoven, Mozart, Bach and John Williams.

60s gold.name: 60s Gold
60s gold.description: It started with the Twist and ended with Woodstock, all 60s hits from Motown and surf music to the British Invasion and folk rock. Hear The Beach Boys, Supremes, Rolling Stones, Aretha Franklin, Four Seasons, The Beatles and more!

ozzy's boneyard.name: Ozzy's Boneyard
ozzy's boneyard.description: Ozzy's Boneyard is the epicenter for hard and heavy classic rock, where the legends live loud and unfiltered. From Black Sabbath, Judas Priest, and Guns N' Roses to AC/DC, Motörhead, and Metallica, these are the riffs that shaped generations. Forever under the spell of Ozzy Osbourne, the Prince of Darkness, this is the sound of power, rebellion, and timeless volume.

shaggy boombastic radio.name: Shaggy Boombastic Radio
shaggy boombastic radio.description: Immerse yourself in reggae and dancehall music, with a splash of vibrant Afrobeats. From the iconic rhythms of Sean Paul and Lady Saw to the dynamic sounds of WizKid and Burna Boy, Shaggy's Boombastic Radio brings the very best of reggae, dancehall and whatever Shaggy's into. Be ready to move with infectious tunes while embracing Caribbean and African music culture. A channel from the mind of the iconic, Grammy Award-winning global hitmaker, Shaggy!

underground garage.name: Underground Garage
underground garage.description: Maximum rock & soul. The 'Coolest records ever made'. Produced by 'Little Steven' Van Zandt, member of the E Street Band and star of The Sopranos.

radio margaritaville.name: Radio Margaritaville
radio margaritaville.description: Escape to Margaritaville. Parrotheads, your ship has come in. From multi-platinum singer, songwriter and author Jimmy Buffett comes a radio paradise of great music, live broadcasts of Buffett's concerts and other unique programs.

prime country.name: Prime Country
prime country.description: This is where country music from the '80s and '90s lives. Garth Brooks, Reba McEntire, George Strait, Shania Twain, Alan Jackson, and Randy Travis all play here.

alt nation.name: Alt Nation
alt nation.description: Connect with the latest & greatest from the biggest artists in modern alternative & discover the next phase of artists pushing the boundaries of alternative music. Each week catch the most popular alt tracks on the Alt18 Countdown, powered by Alt Nation listener votes, catch exclusive session performances and interviews from some of your favorite (and next favorite) artists, plus go next level with your alt music discovery on Alt Nation's weekly new music show, Advanced Placement!

symphony hall.name: Symphony Hall
symphony hall.description: Classical music from yesterday and today performed by top orchestras, chamber music ensembles and instrumental soloists. Featuring Baroque and Beyond, Classics on Film, Living American, SiriusXM Presents the Philadelphia Orchestra, Vox Choral and The Chamber Music Society of Lincoln Center

road dog trucking.name: Road Dog Trucking
road dog trucking.description: Get in gear with the 24-hour channel devoted to the trucking industry. With news, information and entertainment, the channel keeps you up to date on the industry that keeps us moving.

70s on 7.name: 70s on 7
70s on 7.description: Slip on your bell bottoms and light a lava lamp! It's the super 70s with DJs who boogie down and spin 45 rpm records. Polyester outfits, pet rocks, CB radios and disco from a galaxy far, far away! Far out, man!

howard 101.name: Howard 101
howard 101.description: The Howard Stern Wrap-Up Show is live following every episode of The Howard Stern Show, culminating with tie-ins to the best historical content on Sternthology. Fans request their favorite Stern Show moments on Sternthology Live! Plus, enjoy new celebrity specials, concert performances and 30 plus years of Stern Show content 24 hours a day. (explicit)

met opera radio.name: Met Opera Radio
met opera radio.description: Stay connected to the Met's rich past and exciting present. With Metropolitan Opera Radio you can listen, day and night, to up to four live broadcasts weekly during the season, as well as the finest performances ever recorded, including gems from the archives.

the catholic channel.name: The Catholic Channel
the catholic channel.description: Talk about it on The Catholic Channel! Combining a modern talk format and open dialogue, The Catholic Channel focuses on Catholicism in the 21st century, especially as it is lived in today's world. Cardinal Timothy Dolan leads a list of modern voices, including Fr. Dave Dwyer, Lino Rulli, Gus Lloyd, Katie McGrady, and more.

npr now.name: NPR Now
npr now.description: NPR Now offers in-depth news, features, and entertainment produced and assembled by NPR specifically for SiriusXM. NPR's variety channel features Fresh Air and Marketplace, plus public radio favorites like Car Talk, Wait Wait... Don't Tell Me!, Talk of the Nation, as well as new productions from independent producers and public radio stations nationwide.

lithium.name: Lithium
lithium.description: 90s alternative & grunge rock. You'll hear Nirvana, Pearl Jam, Green Day, Smashing Pumpkins, Soundgarden, Weezer, Oasis & more.

siriusxmu.name: SiriusXMU
siriusxmu.description: Groundbreaking music and emerging artists. A commercial-free mix of new music from up-and-coming bands and producers, together with the indie classics that inspired them.

bpm.name: BPM
bpm.description: The beat drops here on BPM. Hear the top dance and electronic hits 24/7. We'll keep you up to date with what's happening in clubs and festivals all over the world. Hear anything from house music, to future bass and everything in between.

doctor radio.name: Doctor Radio
doctor radio.description: Your chance to talk directly to some of the best doctors in the world. Powered by NYU Langone Health.

80s on 8.name: 80s on 8
80s on 8.description: 80s pop hits from the MTV era! The decade when greed was good, hair was high and everyone learned what a music video was. Prince, Wham!, Madonna, Michael Jackson, Cyndi Lauper and Journey! They're all here and so are the original MTV VJs.

liquid metal.name: Liquid Metal
liquid metal.description: Finally, a heavy metal lifestyle radio station for true metalheads blasting out the heaviest metal from the masters that created it to the ones that are perfecting it today. Pantera, Slayer, Metallica, Lamb Of God, Slipknot, Gojira, Spiritbox, Megadeth, Lorna Shore, Anthrax and more. (explicit)

poplandia.name: Poplandia
poplandia.description: Poplandia is the soundtrack for pop culture junkies. Hear the hottest hits and exclusive interviews from your favorite artists. Movies, music, celebrity gossip, current events and more, Poplandia has you covered.

marky ramone's punk rock.name: Marky Ramone's Punk Rock
marky ramone's punk rock.description: Marky Ramone's Punk Rock Blitzkrieg is Classic Punk 24/7 hosted by long-time Ramones drummer Marky Ramone! You'll hear Sex Pistols, Black Flag, Social Distortion, The Clash and of course, The Ramones! All this plus- Songs from Marky's personal music collection, rare recordings, live performances & more! Whether it is Ska-influenced, surf guitar-oriented, Cowpunk, Proto-Punk, Hardcore, or Pop Punk, if it's Classic Punk it's on Marky Ramone’s Punk Rock Blitzkrieg!

she's so funny.name: She's So Funny
she's so funny.description: The funniest female comedians all in one place hand-curated just for you to keep you in stitches!

comedy classics.name: Comedy Classics
comedy classics.description: Classic stand-up from icons of the past, who paved the way for the greats we love today. Timeless comedy that shaped the landscape and defined generations. Featuring legends like Bob Newhart, Joan Rivers, Jackie Gleason and Redd Foxx, as well as exclusive classic archives.

holly.name: Holly
holly.description: Merry and bright holiday hits featuring songs by Mariah Carey, Michael Bublé, Dean Martin, Kelly Clarkson, Pentatonix, Josh Groban, John Legend, Brenda Lee, Train, Gwen Stefani and more.

navidad.name: Navidad
navidad.description: Latin holiday music and traditional sounds, including Ricky Martin, Gloria Estefan, José Feliciano, Tito El Bambino, Marco Antonio Solís and Fania All-Stars.
